name: Same recipe check
description: 檢查是不是都在同一個recipe 造成OOC
output_schema: [{"key": "ooc_recipe_list", "type": "table", "label": "OOC Recipe 清單", "columns": [{"key": "recipeID", "label": "Recipe ID", "type": "string"}, {"key": "count", "label": "發生次數", "type": "integer"}]}, {"key": "is_same_recipe", "type": "badge", "label": "是否為同一 Recipe"}, {"key": "ooc_count", "type": "scalar", "label": "OOC 總次數", "unit": "次"}]
